Twilight Pathways Cast 6+.type: Target unit may reroll failed Charges until your next Psychic Phase.

Mirror of Minds Cast 6+.type: Target one model. Both models roll a d6 and add their Ld to it. If this model's score is higher, target model suffers 2 Mortal Wound.

Shard of Light Cast 8+.type: Target nonTitanic unit suffers -1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase.

Veil of Tears Cast 5+.type: Target unit gains a 4+ Cover Save until your next Psychic Phase.

Webway Dance Cast 8+.type: Target friendly unit with Deepstrike or Outflank is placed back in Reserves. 6
